task:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Install Mantine as the UI component library for the Electron app
   - Migrate all existing screens/components from React Native primitives (`View`, `Text`, `TouchableOpacity`, `StyleSheet`) to Mantine equivalents
   - Use Mantine whenever possible going forward
   - Improve the sessions table: enforce max widths with ellipsis, add copy-to-clipboard icons on hover per column
   - Add activity indicator dots (active/idle/inactive) to the session ID column, matching SessionTree logic
   - Add expandable row dropdown showing last 5 checkpoint IDs per session
   - Redesign the visual style to match a GitHub-style dark interface (screenshot provided), with light/dark mode support
   - Fix dark mode not changing sidebar background color
   - Fix hamburger toggle button being hidden when sidebar is closed
   - **Current task**: Fix the individual session screen not respecting dark mode (stays light when toggled)

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Electron + electron-vite + React + React Router (MemoryRouter)
   - Mantine v7 (`@mantine/core`, `@mantine/hooks`) with PostCSS (`postcss-preset-mantine`, `postcss-simple-vars`)
   - Mantine `AppShell` with `Header` + `Navbar` + `Main` for layout
   - `light-dark()` CSS function for theme-aware colors (relies on Mantine setting `color-scheme` on `<html>`)
   - `localStorageColorSchemeManager` + `defaultColorScheme="dark"` for persistent color scheme
   - `useDisclosure` for sidebar open/close state
   - `createTheme` with custom GitHub-inspired dark palette (`dark[0..9]` = `#e6edf3` → `#000000`)
   - Mantine `Table` with `stickyHeader` + `Table.ScrollContainer` for tabular data
   - Mantine `Timeline` component for checkpoint timeline view
   - Mantine `Collapse` for expandable sections
   - `navigator.clipboard.writeText` for copy-to-clip
Almost there. Looks good but the code blocks still have light backgrounds in dark mode.
user_feedback_text: Almost there. Looks good but the code blocks still have light backgrounds in dark mode.

This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Fix dark mode for individual session screen and child components (EventItem, ToolGroupItem, ToolUseItem, MarkdownView)
   - Remove dropdown from session rows — clicking a row navigates directly to session detail
   - Add username/repo breadcrumb navigation in the header; session detail adds session-id as third crumb
   - Redesign session detail page as a chat transcript (user bubbles right, Claude bubbles left)
   - Nest tool use rows inside Claude response cards, shown underneath Claude's message
   - Add Claude Code logo as Claude's avatar; GitHub avatar for user
   - Format all timestamps as relative time ("5m ago") with hover tooltip showing absolute time + click-to-copy
   - Rework overview panel: show latest checkpoint's intent + open items list
   - Make open items actionable with checkboxes; show "Work on selection in new session?" button when items selected
   - Use Claude Code SDK (not IPC/terminal spawn) to create new sessions
   - Fix: new spawned sessions not appearing in Active Sessions list
   - Current debugging: SDK-spawned sessions run successfully but aren't recorded in gossamer's SQLite DB

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Electron + electron-vite + React + React Router (MemoryRouter)
   - Mantine v7 components: `AppShell`, `Avatar`, `Checkbox`, `Tooltip`, `ActionIcon`, `Collapse`, `Badge`, `ScrollArea`, `Table`, `Timeline`, `Code`
   - `light-dark()` CSS function for theme-aware colors (Mantine sets `color-scheme` on `<html>`)
   - React Context (`BreadcrumbContext`) for header breadcrumb state shared between Layout and child pages
   - Claude Agent SDK (`@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk`) — `query()` async generator for spawning sessions
   - `CLAUDECODE` env var: prevents nested Claude Code sessions; must be `delete`d before calling `query()`
   - Goss
